# OpenAgents Docs

> Use, understand, and verify the local-first OpenAgents Desktop Codex workroom.

## Docs

- [OpenAgents Desktop](https://openagents.com/docs): A local-first workroom for durable, reviewable Codex work.
- [Getting started](https://openagents.com/docs/getting-started): Run the current OpenAgents Desktop candidate from source.
- [Workroom](https://openagents.com/docs/workroom): Understand sessions, the causal timeline, and composer actions.
- [Review and recovery](https://openagents.com/docs/review-and-recovery): Review exact changes and understand restart behavior.
- [Security and privacy](https://openagents.com/docs/security-and-privacy): The local authority, credential, and renderer boundaries of OpenAgents Desktop.
- [Troubleshooting](https://openagents.com/docs/troubleshooting): Diagnose common development and workroom states without widening authority.
- [Agent-readable docs](https://openagents.com/docs/agent-readable): Static Markdown and discovery artifacts for tools and coding agents.

## Future / Advanced

- [Future and advanced topics](https://openagents.com/docs/future): Historical OpenAgents ideas and dormant design horizons, separated from the current Desktop MVP.
- [Marketplaces](https://openagents.com/docs/future/marketplaces): The historical OpenAgents thesis for agent, plugin, data, compute, and outcome markets.
- [Nostr](https://openagents.com/docs/future/nostr): Historical Nostr identity, registry, storage, and open-protocol experiments.
- [Bitcoin and Lightning](https://openagents.com/docs/future/bitcoin-and-lightning): Historical Bitcoin, Lightning, L402, wallet, tipping, payout, and settlement experiments.
- [Remote workrooms](https://openagents.com/docs/future/remote-workrooms): The dormant design horizon for Fleet, mobile supervision, remote targets, and portable sessions.
